answer:
The PitchBook API authenticates requests using a unique API key provided by your account manager [1]. You must include this key in the Authorization header of every request using the format PB-Token {API_KEY} [1]. To obtain your credentials, contact your PitchBook account manager to purchase access, which will provide you with either a production or sandbox key [1]. Ensure your account has sufficient purchased credits to perform these requests [1]. Below is a conceptual example of how to include the required header in a REST request:

```
Authorization: PB-Token your_api_key_here
```
